name: studio.add_keyword
description: Add a keyword to an Actium Studio site's SEO keyword tracker. Returns the assigned keyword_id.
whenToUse: Content strategist identifies a new target keyword that should be tracked against the site.
Campaign launch: bulk-add keywords the campaign is optimizing for so rank data accumulates from day one.
Competitor analysis flow: add keywords competitors rank for that this site should also target.
whenNotToUse: Keyword already tracked — call studio.list_keywords first to avoid duplicate rows.
Caller is editing page content for SEO — that's studio.update_page; this skill only tracks rank data.
Caller wants to delete / untrack a keyword — out of scope; operator console handles removal in v1.
